Bash(git -C "C:/Progettiscemi/TrekTrak" commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Update design spec after review: add data model, API contracts, phasing, edge cases

Resolved all high-priority review findings: marker-drag behavior,
state management \(Zustand\), dislivello ownership, roadbook navigation
details, elevation API fallback strategy with CORS-safe OpenTopoData.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Progettiscemi/TrekTrak" commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Update implementation plan after review: add missing features and fixes

Added: ItineraryTable component, SavedItinerariesModal, JSON import/export,
@dnd-kit drag-and-drop for waypoint reordering, 50-waypoint limit,
non-blocking validation, localStorage limit warning.
Fixed: TDD import flow, loadItinerary preserving ID, createdAt preservation,
MapContainer naming.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C C:/Progettiscemi/TrekTrak commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: resolve review rounds 10-12 issues

- Store: add clearAllValidation batch action, clear stale validation on form edits
- Store: loadItinerary rebuilds consecutive leg chain with recalculateLeg
- ActionBar: use clearAllValidation, read tolerances from getState, skip empty updates
- ItineraryHeader: strip validationState from save/export, confirm on import
- SavedItinerariesModal: confirm before load, fix z-index to z-[1001]
- ToleranceSettings: Number.isFinite instead of isNaN, fix z-index
- WaypointCard: delete confirmation dialog, lat/lon range constraints
- export-gpx: Number.isFinite check on altitude before GPX output
- export-json: FileReader.onerror handler

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(timeout 15 bash -c 'while ! curl -s http://localhost:3000 > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done; echo "ready"' 2>&1)
